articles.title: 2026 Playoffs First‑Round Odds: Lakers Eye Sweep, Rockets Favored
articles.original_title: 2026 NBA playoffs first-round series odds: Lakers go for sweep, but Rockets are favored - The New York Times
articles.summary: Betting markets project the Los Angeles Lakers as heavy favorites to sweep the Houston Rockets in the first round of the 2026 NBA playoffs, despite the Rockets holding a slight edge in the overall series odds. The disparity reflects the Lakers' recent form and depth, while the Rockets are viewed as a tougher opponent than their record suggests.
key_points: Oddsmakers give the Lakers a strong chance to win the series in four games.
The Rockets are listed as the slight favorite in overall series odds, indicating a competitive matchup.
Betting lines highlight the Lakers' recent roster upgrades and playoff momentum.

articles.title: Lakers Pull Off Historic Game‑3 Comeback Over Rockets
articles.original_title: Lakers Achieved Rare NBA Playoffs History With Game 3 Comeback Vs. Rockets
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers rallied from a 6‑point deficit with 34.4 seconds left to defeat the Houston Rockets in Game 3, marking a rare comeback in NBA playoff history. A clutch sequence by Marcus Smart and LeBron James sealed the win and gave the Lakers a pivotal series lead.
key_points: Lakers trailed 101‑95 with under 35 seconds remaining before scoring the decisive points.
Marcus Smart and LeBron James combined for the game‑winning play.
The comeback is noted as one of the few last‑second turnarounds in playoff annals.

articles.title: Rockets’ Game‑3 Meltdown Becomes Historic Moment
articles.original_title: Rockets Make History in Game 3 Meltdown vs. Lakers - Sports Illustrated
articles.summary: Houston’s collapse in Game 3 against the Los Angeles Lakers was labeled a historic meltdown by Sports Illustrated, as the team surrendered a late lead and fell to a devastating loss. The collapse underscored the Rockets’ struggles to close out games in the postseason.
key_points: Houston lost a late‑game advantage, allowing the Lakers to rally.
The defeat is described as a historic playoff meltdown for the Rockets.
The loss shifted momentum firmly toward the Lakers in the series.

key_points: Smart emphasizes intensity and defensive toughness for the upcoming game.
